task_name: Calculus Derivatives Teaching Animation and Handout
description: Create an animation demonstrating derivative concepts and a companion teaching handout.
prompt: I am a calculus instructor, and I want to produce a teaching materials package on the concept of derivatives for my introductory calculus students. (1) Create an animation derivatives_animation.mp4 showing: the function f(x)=x² at the point x=1, where a secant line progressively approaches the tangent line as h decreases from 2 down to 0.01. Dynamically display the slope value as it changes, and annotate the final derivative f'(1)=2. Then show f(x)=sin(x) with its derivative f'(x)=cos(x) overlaid on the same axes. (2) Create a companion teaching handout derivatives_slides.pdf (at least 8 pages) covering: definition of a derivative, limit formula, geometric interpretation, common derivative formulas table, chain rule, and application examples.

evaluators.description: Verify PDF has at least 8 pages
